'''haputu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crab|crab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crab|crab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haputu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpitith|hæpitith]] || [[word:hæpitij|hæpitij]] || [[word:hæpitish|hæpitish]] || [[word:hæpiti|hæpiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapupututh|hapupututh]] || [[word:hapuputuj|hapuputuj]] || [[word:hapuputush|hapuputush]] || [[word:hapuputu|hapuputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapututh|hapututh]] || [[word:haputuj|haputuj]] || [[word:haputush|haputush]] || [[word:haputu|haputu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapuftufth|hapuftufth]] || [[word:hapuftufj|hapuftufj]] || [[word:hapuftufsh|hapuftufsh]] || [[word:hapuftuf|hapuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapututhu|hapututhu]] || [[word:haputuju|haputuju]] || [[word:haputushu|haputushu]] || [[word:haputuku|haputuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapututh|hapututh]] || [[word:haputuj|haputuj]] || [[word:haputush|haputush]] || [[word:haputu|haputu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapututhul|hapututhul]] || [[word:haputujul|haputujul]] || [[word:haputushul|haputushul]] || [[word:haputukul|haputukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haputuuthuthu|haputuuthuthu]] || [[word:haputuujuju|haputuujuju]] || [[word:haputuushushu|haputuushushu]] || [[word:haputuuku|haputuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapututhun|hapututhun]] || [[word:haputujun|haputujun]] || [[word:haputushun|haputushun]] || [[word:haputukun|haputukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapututhuoro|hapututhuoro]] || [[word:haputujuoro|haputujuoro]] || [[word:haputushuoro|haputushuoro]] || [[word:haputukuoro|haputukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
